commit.subject: LU-19210 tests: fix test_130i to support with 64KB PAGE_SIZE
commit.message:
LU-19210 tests: fix test_130i to support with 64KB PAGE_SIZE

- Replaced the hardcoded 4KB block size with a dynamic value:
  page_kb=$((PAGE_SIZE / 1024)).
- Updated dd command and expected size calculation to use page_kb

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientdistro=rocky9.5 \
clientarch=aarch64 env=ONLY=130i,ONLY_REPEAT=10

Signed-off-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I458d21e98a5240f690fb476cc54d849170bbe9cc
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61869
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@dilger.ca>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
